name: scaffold-support-partition
description: Workflow-guide scaffold: collect candidates, foreach verify, partition verdicts with a bundle-local support helper, and reduce final report. Copy before adapting.

stages.prompt: Collect candidate findings for the runtime task. Do not modify files. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, and candidates. candidates must be an array of 0-8 candidate finding objects. Each candidate must include id, title, severity, locations, evidenceQuotes, rationale, and recommendedAction. locations must contain repository file pins, with line/lineEnd/symbol when known. evidenceQuotes must be exact quotes. Put detailed evidence and caveats in <analysis>. Put refs as an array in <refs>.

each.prompt: Verify this candidate finding against repository evidence: ${item}. Do not modify files. Try to refute it. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, candidateId, finding, verdict, evidenceQuotes, counterEvidence, and recommendedAction. verdict must be exactly KEEP, WEAKEN, DROP, or NEEDS_HUMAN. Echo the verified finding object in finding. KEEP only when evidence is strong and impact is actionable. WEAKEN when plausible but severity/action should be reduced. DROP when unsupported or non-actionable. NEEDS_HUMAN when ambiguous. Put detailed reasoning in <analysis> and refs in <refs>.

stages.prompt: Produce the final finding-partition-smoke report. Read the partition-verdicts.control artifact with workflow_artifact before final output. Report only kept and weakened findings from value.reportContext.keep and value.reportContext.weaken. Do not include dropped findings as findings. Put NEEDS_HUMAN items only in needsHuman. Copy findingId, title, severity, locations, and evidenceQuotes from the support helper reportContext. Put machine-readable JSON in <control> with schema, digest, summary, findings, needsHuman, partitionSummary, and recommendedNextAction. Put details and evidence discussion in <analysis>.
